title: Modified protocol for URA3 counter-selection in Saccharomyces cerevisiae
author: Lenny Teytelman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf7njrme

steps.title: Perform the standard LiAc transformation to...
steps.instruction: Perform the standard LiAc transformation to replace the locus of interest with the URA3 cassette.

steps.title: Grow on CSM-Ura3 plates and confirm...
steps.instruction: Grow on CSM-Ura3 plates and confirm that the integration is correct by sequencing.

steps.title: Perform the standard LiAc transformation to...
steps.instruction: Perform the standard LiAc transformation to replace the URA3 cassette with the target sequence.

steps.title: After the heat-shock, plate the cells...
steps.instruction: After the heat-shock, plate the cells onto YPD-plates, for Overnight growth.

steps.title: Press the YPD plate onto the...
steps.instruction: Press the YPD plate onto the velvet on the replica-plating block.

steps.title: [Mock replica-plating] Press a new YPD...
steps.instruction: [Mock replica-plating] Press a new YPD plate against the velvet and discard the plate.

steps.title: [Mock replica-plating] Repeat Step6 another 4...
steps.instruction: [Mock replica-plating] Repeat Step6 another 4 times to slice through the layers with excess Ura3.

steps.title: [Replica-plating] After the five mock-YPD replicas,...
steps.instruction: [Replica-plating] After the five mock-YPD replicas, press a single 5-FOA plate against the same velvet.

steps.title: Grow the colonies and screen for...
steps.instruction: Grow the colonies and screen for the correct integration using sequencing.
